mapper.select:
SELECT r.id,r.out_trade_no as outTradeNo, r.out_refund_no as outRefundNo, r.amount, r.state, r.user_id as userId, r.prepay_id as prepayId, r.notify_time as notifyTime, r.create_time as createTime, r.car_id as carId, r.explain , r.refund_id as refundId, r.back_status as backStatus FROM app_auction_bail_refund_log r left join app_auction u on u.id = r.car_id left join app_auction_order o on r.car_id = o.car_id and r.user_id = o.user_id
(r.state = 0 or r.state = 2) and u.car_state > 7
